roles.name: Analyst / Thinker
roles.description: You value facts and detail. Experiences that involve observation and reasoning light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视事实与细节。需要观察与推理的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Explorer / Adventurer
roles.description: You value freedom and discovery. Experiences that involve movement and new terrain light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视自由与发现。需要行动与新地形的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Connector / Host
roles.description: You value people and shared energy. Experiences that involve gathering and conversation light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视人群与共享能量。需要聚会与交谈的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Creator / Artist
roles.description: You value expression and craft. Experiences that involve making and imagining light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视表达与手作。需要创造与想象的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Guardian / Nurturer
roles.description: You value care and steadiness. Experiences that involve comfort and restoration light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视关照与稳定。需要舒适与恢复的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Visionary / Idealist
roles.description: You value meaning and possibility. Experiences that involve wonder and reflection light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视意义与可能。需要惊奇与反思的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Energizer / Performer
roles.description: You value intensity and spotlight moments. Experiences that involve thrill and audience energy light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视强度与高光时刻。需要刺激与人群能量的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Gourmet / Sensor
roles.description: You value taste and texture. Experiences that involve flavor, scent, and the senses light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视味道与触感。需要风味、气味与感官的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Seeker / Wanderer
roles.description: You value quiet journeys inward. Experiences that involve solitude and soft landscapes light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视向内的安静旅程。需要独处与柔软风景的体验最能点亮你。

roles.name: Strategist / Builder
roles.description: You value systems and momentum. Experiences that involve planning, challenge, and progress light you up.
roles.descriptionZh: 你重视系统与推进力。需要规划、挑战与进步的体验最能点亮你。
